steps.title: Check the common factor
steps.content: A factor of the whole expression must divide every term. The coefficients $4$, $52$, and $28$ are all divisible by $4$.

steps.title: Factor the expression
steps.content:
Factor $4$ out of each term:
$$4x^2+52x+28=4(x^2+13x+7)$$
So $4$ is a factor. The answer is C.
